author: doll-agent
content: Add Poly::with_mapping(self, domain, window) trait method (each basis impls via with_domain.then.with_window). Add ConvertBasis::convert_with_mapping<T: FromPowerBasis>(domain, window) default that converts coefficients via power-basis pivot and applies the mapping (source's by default, or explicit overrides). 2 new tests for Chebyshev. Mirrors numpy's convert(domain, kind, window).
